base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_layout_horizontal_long_b — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 contra. Side-scrolling long-stage — 3840px wide (~15 screens). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
